headline: Shopping for Portfolio Security? The iShares Consumer Staples ETF (IYK) Outperforms Invesco Food & Beverage (PBJ) in Cost, Yield, and Performance
summary: IYK delivered 8.3% returns over one year with a 2.5% dividend yield, while maintaining broader sector diversification across household products and tobacco alongside food and beverage stocks.

headline: Northern Trust (NTRS) Wins Invesco Fund Mandate, Is The Stock Now Overvalued?
summary: Northern Trust (NTRS) is back in focus after being appointed by Invesco to provide administration, custody and depositary services for a new Irish mutual fund range that uses swap based index replication. See our latest analysis for Northern Trust. Set against this new Invesco mandate, Northern Trust’s recent share price return patterns show momentum that many investors will be watching closely. The 30 day share price return is 5.56%, the 90 day share price return is 16.03%, and the year to...
